title: Unlimited Adventures (Official)
description:
The Official Unlimited Adventures SMP Modpack!

-> Quality of Life, Shaders, Tweaks and Custom Menu
body:
# **The Official Unlimited Adventures SMP Modpack!**

## **-> Quality of Life <-**
No more sorting your inventory, no more replacing almost broken tools, etc...

## **-> Minimap and World Map <-**
Tired of writing down the coordinates?
This modpack will solve that problem with a minimap, world map and waypoint manager!

## **-> Bringing the server to life <-**
With resource packs and shader packs included, the server never looked more real.

## **-> Revamped audio <-**
Made the game audio as realistic as possible.

## **-> Proximity Voice Chat <-**
In-game Proximity Voice chat for extra realism.

## **-> Client Tweaks <-**
Tweaks for more FPS

## **-> RECOMMENDED SETTINGS <-**
1. Go to options
2. Scroll down to Java memory
3. Check the box that says Override global memory settings
4. Change the slider till you have at least 4GB allocated

![Allocated RAM options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b10b679fde450407d5104f61f75f86002c2e62ec.png)
